introSection: Arkham Asylum - Shock Therapy was a Vekoma inverted roller coaster located in Warner Bros. Movie World in Queensland, Australia. It was formerly known as Lethal Weapon - The Ride.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The coaster recieved VR on 24 September 2014, lasting until the ride's closure in December 2019. In 2022, the ride was demolished.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Grey track and blue supports. The ride used to feature blue track and supports.

fullText:
Arkham Asylum - Shock Therapy was a Vekoma inverted roller coaster located in Warner Bros. Movie World in Queensland, Australia. It was formerly known as Lethal Weapon - The Ride.

The coaster recieved VR on 24 September 2014, lasting until the ride's closure in December 2019. In 2022, the ride was demolished.



Grey track and blue supports. The ride used to feature blue track and supports.
